changelog:
TACTICAL OPERATOR V5.2:
- [RADAR] Sonar Pulse: Introduced a tactical Morse Code pinging system for lightweight, low-bandwidth node interactions.
- [UI] The Morse Synthesizer: Added real-time Web Audio API generation for decoding encrypted Sonar Pulses directly in the browser.
- [SECURITY] Divergent Routing: Sonar payloads are securely routed to the Alerts table with Double Shield Regex validation and dedicated rate-limiting.
